g.title: PWR
g.text: Upstream battery / kill / fuse / ignition not shown

g.title: DCDC
g.text: Automotive mode — OFFDELAY 1 min, HARDOFF 1 min

g.title: PICAN
g.text: 120 Ω term at JP1 · 3 A SMPS powers Pi · IRQ on GPIO25

g.title: W_CAN
g.text: Twisted pair, terminated 120 Ω each end

g.title: W_PI5V
g.text: 5 V from PiCAN SMPS via GPIO header

g.title: PI
g.text: J2 momentary short → boot or clean shutdown

g.title: W_DISP_PWR
g.text: 5 V/GND tap from Pi GPIO header
